text: What is it? Can you tell me what it is? Play-doh. What kind of play-doh though? Have a look at the picture. What's the picture? Look. Look at the picture, babe. Look. Look at the picture. Where is he at? Where's that man at? Is he getting his hair cut? You can do his hair. You can cut his hair and you can brush his hair. You can do his hair all nice and beautiful. What do you think? Do you like it?
